title: Unit 5 – Practice Pool 2: Ruby's Advice (Ratschläge geben)
description: Vokabular für Ratschläge: Phrasen und Ausdrücke für Tipps und Meinungen

items.question: You ___ talk to your parents about it. (Ratschlag)
You ___ use your phone during lessons. (Verneinung - Ratschlag)
Why ___ you ask a teacher for help?
If I ___ you, I would ask Ruby for advice.
I think it ___ be a good idea to switch off your phone.
Have you ___ talking to your friend about it?
You could ___ posting less often.
Ruby gives ___ to teenagers with problems.
An agony ___ answers letters about personal problems.
Ratschlag (Substantiv) → Englisch
Rat geben → Englisch
jemandem Rat geben → to give ___ to someone
I think it's a good idea ___ share your problems with someone.
It's important ___ stay in touch with your friends.
Is that good ___? (Ratschlag - Substantiv)
Do you ___ with Ruby's advice? (zustimmen)
Do you ___ with that? (nicht zustimmen)
I ___ that's good advice. (Meinung)
In my ___, you should talk to your parents.
meiner Meinung nach → in my ___
